jobs.basic_qualifications:
- 2+ years of experience in theatrical distribution, cinema operations, booking coordination or administrative roles in the film industry
- Understanding of theatrical booking processes and cinema operations
- Familiarity with digital cinema technology, DCPs and KDM systems
- Strong organizational skills with ability to manage multiple tasks and competing deadlines
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Outlook, Word)
- Experience with booking or sales database systems
- Excellent communication skills with ability to build relationships with exhibitors and suppliers
- Problem-solving skills and ability to work independently
jobs.description:
Amazon MGM Studios seeks a Theatrical Sales and Operations Specialist for Australia/NZ who will provide essential operational support to the Sales Managers and theatrical distribution team. This role focuses on managing independent cinema bookings, coordinating film materials and promotional assets, arranging trade screenings and ensuring seamless technical delivery across the ANZ theatrical marketplace. The position serves as the operational backbone of the distribution team, handling day-to-day booking administration, KDM management and materials coordination with exhibitors and technical suppliers. This position reports to the Head of Australia/NZ Theatrical Distribution.

Key job responsibilities
- Manage bookings and ongoing relationships with independent cinema accounts and smaller circuit exhibitors across Australia and New Zealand, including sub-run engagements, film societies, outdoor cinemas, and charity screenings
- Coordinate with independent cinemas on screen availability, session time policy, weekly holdover requirements, and support Sales Managers with major circuit account administration
- Manage end-to-end delivery of trailers, posters, and promotional materials to exhibitors across ANZ, coordinating with tech suppliers and Content Delivery Service providers
- Generate, distribute, and track KDMs for all theatrical bookings while troubleshooting technical delivery issues with exhibitors and suppliers
- Provide comprehensive support to Sales Managers in managing film classification and ratings processes across ANZ
- Book and arrange trade screenings and industry previews, including venue bookings, technical requirements, catering, and invitation management
- Assist with data entry and maintenance of the Sales and Booking system to support accurate box office reporting
- Coordinate with Finance team on booking paperwork and payment tracking while responding to exhibitor inquiries
- Support festival distribution activities including submission coordination, materials delivery, and screening logistics
- Provide general administrative support to the National Sales Managers and distribution team at industry events and conventions

jobs.description:
Amazon MGM Studios seeks a Senior Theatrical Sales Manager for Australia/NZ to execute sales and distribution strategies for all theatrical releases. This role implements strategic plans, manages exhibitor relationships, coordinates release scheduling, provides business intelligence reporting, and leads the sales team. The Senior Theatrical Sales Manager drives sales operations to optimize box office performance and profitability for each title, while executing local market strategies aligned with global studio objectives. This position reports to the Head of Australia/NZ Theatrical Distribution.

Key job responsibilities
- Develop and execute sales strategies across theatrical releases that align with commercial objectives
- Negotiate with exhibitors to secure optimal screen count and terms
- Build and maintain strong exhibitor relationships to support release performance
- Manage weekly session planning and holdovers to maximize screen count
- Analyze market trends, audience behavior, and box office performance
- Collaborate with the Theatrical Marketing team to share insights, align sales strategies with marketing initiatives, ensuring consistent messaging
- Manage relationship and ongoing operations with the preferred Content Delivery Service company
- Manage the implementation, testing, training and setup of the Sales and Booking system
- Oversee forecasting, admissions targets, and revenue modeling for all titles
- Lead, mentor, and manage the sales team to achieve commercial Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
- Support release date planning that balances local conditions with studio objectives
- Maintain market release schedule and communicate competitive film movements
- Present release plans to exhibition clients and coordinate promotional activities
- Collect and analyze box office data to inform tactical decisions
- Monitor and maintain distribution budgets within established guidelines
- Prepare and deliver internal and external reports for stakeholders
- Maintain and monitor accurate records of sales, terms and payments, in conjunction with the Finance Manager
- Manage the planning, production, classification, and delivery of trailers and promotional assets

jobs.basic_qualifications:

jobs.description:
Amazon MGM Studios seeks a Theatrical Sales Manager for Australia/NZ who will be responsible for implementation of the strategy set by the Head of Theatrical Distribution. The position manages a portfolio of key Australian and New Zealand exhibitor accounts, handling bookings, negotiations and ongoing account management, as well as managing Operations. Working closely with internal teams and external partners, the role translates sales strategy into effective release execution—driving screen count, session placement and market coverage to maximize box office performance for each title on the Amazon MGM Studios slate.

Key job responsibilities
- Assist in executing sales strategies across theatrical releases that align with commercial objectives
- Assist with weekly session planning and negotiations with exhibitors to secure optimal terms, holdovers, and maximise screen count across territories
- Process and manage exhibitor bookings, holdovers, and maintain accurate records of sales terms and payments in coordination with Finance team.
- Track and compile competitor release date calendar and monitor and report competitor activity
- Research market trends and comparable title performance
- Conduct competitive analysis and release date viability assessments to ensure optimal market positioning for Amazon MGM titles
- Assist in creating revenue forecasts and territory strategies for all titles
- Undertake comprehensive box office performance analysis across all theatrical releases, tracking opening weekend and lifetime forecasts.
- Develop and maintain box office, admissions and revenue forecasts for the theatrical marketplace
- Manage daily box office reporting for Amazon MGM bookings in internal tracking systems
- Prepare detailed film performance and industry analysis reports
- Prepare and deliver sales materials, industry communications and trade screening presentations
- Maintain regular communication with exhibitors and internal stakeholders and follow-up actions
- Coordinate operations with the preferred Content Delivery Service company
- Support the set-up, UAT and implementation of the Sales and Booking system
- Managing festival distribution activity for the slate, coordinating submissions, premieres and curator relationships
- Manage the planning, production, classification and delivery of trailers and promotional assets across ANZ
- Maintain and monitor accurate records of sales, terms and payments, in conjunction with the Finance department

jobs.description:
Join our dynamic team and become a critical guardian of technological infrastructure! As a Data Center Engineering Technician, you'll play a pivotal role in maintaining the heartbeat of mission-critical technology infrastructure, ensuring seamless operations that power global digital experiences. Your expertise will directly contribute to maintaining an extraordinary 99.999% uptime, keeping the digital world running smoothly and efficiently.

Engineering Technicians are Amazon’s front line when it comes to hands-on electrical and mechanical equipment troubleshooting. They will maintain, operate, and troubleshoot, Data Center Operation’s Mission Critical Facilities, which includes stand-by diesel generators and related fuel systems, as well as three phase electrical systems such as: switch gear, UPSs, PDUs, wet cell batteries and associated systems, CRAC, centrifugal chillers, cooling towers/water chemical system, air handlers and associated systems, pumps, & motors.

AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.

You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.

NOTE: Amazon does not sponsor for immigration, including for H-1B, TN, and other non-immigrant visas, for this role.

NOTE: Lump sum stipend will be provided to eligible candidates who relocate for this position.

Key job responsibilities

• Daily building rounds to monitor and record information from electrical, mechanical, fire/life safety, and cooling equipment to ensure 24/7 reliability and availability
• Monitor and operate mission critical liquid cooling infrastructure
• Conduct glycol concentration testing and adjustments
• Operate and maintain water distribution systems, including water chemistry, pumps and piping networks
• Perform maintenance, troubleshooting, root cause analysis, and repair of liquid cooling systems
• Technical writing to support change management program
• Monitor daily work requests and manage to resolution, and execute projects from conception to completion
• On-site support of contractors, sub-contractors and vendors, ensuring that all work performed is in accordance with established practices, procedures & local legislation
• Work schedule changes depending on specific site needs. Shifts are usually 12-hours and may rotate on a predefined day, mid, or night schedule. Some locations have on-call rotations. Must be flexible on work schedule and willing to work holidays and weekends, as needed
• Role may support more than one location/site.

Physical Requirements:
• Willingness and demonstrated ability to work in the following physical conditions with reasonable accommodations:
• Regularly lift and/or move up to 39 pounds independently
• Participate in group lifts for 40+ pounds
• Maintain balance and perform construction tasks while on a ladder
• Regularly walk, use hands and fingers, handle or feel, reach with hands and arms, stoop, kneel, crouch or crawl, climb stairs, twist, bend, work above shoulders, grasp, carry, push and pull objects into position
• Work in an environment requiring provided ear protection

This role supports data centers in various operational stages. The position may be assigned to a facility still under development, which could require travel to established locations for training until your designated site becomes fully operational.

Essential Requirements:
• Ability to travel to or commute between data center locations as needed
• Willingness to temporarily work at alternative sites during training periods or until assigned facility is operational
• Travel frequency will vary based on business needs and operational status of assigned facility

Candidates must be able to travel (over 50 miles) or commute (less than 50 miles) to active data center sites as required by business needs.

- 1+ years of test automation frameworks and tools building experience
- 2+ years of non-internship professional software development testing experience
- Experience programming with at least one modern language such as Java, C++, or C# including object-oriented design
- Experience in penetration testing and exploitability-focused vulnerability assessment
- Experience in platform-level security mitigations and hardening for Linux and Windows
- Experience debugging, diagnosing, and troubleshooting complex, production software issues
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, a related field, or equivalent experience
jobs.description:
We are looking to hire a Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) in Ring India within the HW/SW development organization, responsible for the quality of Ring core products including doorbell camera, security camera, and other new products. The ideal candidate will be curious, creative, goal-oriented, and excited to support other internal team members. You take ownership of your work and are passionate about software quality, consistency, maintainability, performance, and security. You will own the testing, and quality assurance of multiple tools and cloud services that support our Ring products. You will have the opportunity to develop industry leading tools and frameworks that raise the quality bar of our products.

Key job responsibilities
oining our team gives you the opportunity to :
• Drive the vision and implementation of test infrastructures and frameworks that allow developers to easily write reliable tests.
• Invent ways to ensure that every change we make can be deployed safely and quickly.
• You will help solve our most difficult challenges, and you will coach other engineers to foster a culture of relentlessly high standards.

A day in the life
In this role, you will:
• Review and coordinate with automation strategy across multiple teams and layers of technology stack (OS, services, API, SDK, application, UI and end-to-end).
• Provide patterns and examples for the team to automate tests for all types of testing (service integration tests, functionality, API/SDK, UI, performance, security, and more).
• Assess automation efforts to look for gaps and to suggest better approaches as needed.
• Plan and create tools to automate manual tasks, aid in operational work, and as supplements to automated testing.
• Participate in design and code inspections.
• Develop and deploy new test frameworks and monitoring systems.
• Drive execution and maintenance of test frameworks, tests, and release processes.
• Gain a deep understanding of dependencies, and how to build automation to prevent regression from upstream/cross-stream changes.

About the team
Ring, since its founding in 2013, has been on a mission to make neighborhoods safer. From the video doorbell, to Ring Alarm, which was named #1 in Customer Satisfaction for DIY Home Security Systems by J.D. Power, Ring’s smart home security product line, as well as the Neighbors app, offer users affordable whole-home and neighborhood security. At Ring, we are committed to making home and neighborhood security accessible and effective for everyone — while working hard to bring communities together. Ring is an Amazon company. For more information, visit www.ring.com. With Ring, you’re always home.

Overview
The L3 associate acts as the primary interface between Amazon and our delivery partners, so to our delivery partners- you ARE Amazon. L3 Associates are expected to identify DP concerns and work on troubleshooting delivery partner issues and provide process improvement suggestions.

Summary of Responsibilities
- Effectively communicate in a clear and professional manner at all times
- Provides/ expedites prompt and efficient service to Amazon customers/ delivery partners
- Effectively manage sensitive cases by reporting up the escalation matrix
- Demonstrate excellent time-management skills
- Maintains or exceeds targeted performance metrics
- Actively seek solutions through logical reasoning and identify trends to suggest process improvements

jobs.description:
We are seeking a talented, dedicated, and highly analytical Instock Account Specialist to drive selection and in-stock for Amazon. This is a unique opportunity to play a key role on an important initiative at Amazon. This position requires a candidate with proven analytical skills with experience driving process improvement, thought leadership, and delivering results.

The Instock Account Specialist will be responsible for executing inventory strategies to optimize customer experience, sales, margin and turns. They will be relentlessly focused on delivering high in-stock rates in order to meet the needs of our customers. They will dive deep core drivers of in-stock performance, and proactively identify opportunities to improve tools and work flows. This role interacts closely with retail and operations business partners across Amazon, and is pivotal to the growth of this strategic initiative.

Key job responsibilities
Responsibilities
1. Maintain excellent in-stock rates for owned category and/or region
2. Execute inventory strategies to optimize sales, turns, and inventory health
3. Monitor, analyze and own key performance indicators such as in-stock rate, procurement lead time (PLT), fill rate, forecast accuracy and days of cover (DOC).
4. Forecast and manage efficient inbound and outbound inventory flows and health, including forecasting, purchasing, and removing unproductive inventory


A day in the life
-

About the team

- Experience in engineering including a supervisory role managing people

jobs.description:
At Amazon, we're working to be the most customer-centric company on earth. To get there, we need exceptionally talented, bright, and driven people. If you'd like to help us build the place to find and buy anything online, this is your chance to make history. Amazon Projects team need to have in-depth understanding of Project life cycle including span allocation for all the four pillars (assessment, design and detailing, Execution and Performance qualification) of any project. Some of the key aspects of the role are Site Selection along with the RE team, Project statutory and Legal compliances adherence, Project Safety both in terms of design and execution, value management for large and medium scale projects, executing various formats of technical projects-green field, brown field and Improvement projects.

Key job responsibilities
KEY JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Strategic Planning & Execution: • Lead planning and execution of all building formats for North India region • Manage setting up of new Centers across different business formats • Oversee capacity expansion of existing facilities • Coordinate facility relocations as per business requirements • Drive 1-2 project management initiatives (Standardization, Energy Conservation programs, Productivity Improvement measures) • Manage project financial processes

Site Assessment & Planning: • Support Real Estate Team in site visits and due diligence through site inspections • Conduct feasibility assessments for setting up facilities for given business formats • Finalize conceptual layouts and assess layout parameters from operations perspective • Prepare Developer's Scope of Work as per standards and specifications • Prepare Amazon scope of work and cost estimates • Prepare and submit Build out Capex requests for approval

Project Management: • Finalize Project Management Consultants (PMC) • Conduct project resource planning and management through appointed PMC or hired resources • Work with Procurement team to evaluate and finalize vendors • Review material requirements with all stakeholders for facility setup and launch • Track material receipt and implementation

Execution & Quality Control: • Monitor progress and manage execution of onsite activities for Amazon scope of work • Track and ensure quality of work by the Developer • Ensure snag-free handover to Facilities Team • Work with Launch team in preparation of site launch closer to completion • Ensure budget adherence and safe execution at site with no budget overruns • Target Zero LTI (Lost Time Injuries) • Prepare weekly progress reviews and reports with status updates • Ensure timely project closure including commercials

Compliance & Safety: • Ensure adherence to Safety and Statutory compliance in all projects • Maintain highest standards and good engineering practices • Implement safe execution protocols across all project sites

KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS

The successful candidate will be measured on:

Project Execution and OTIF Delivery: >95% • Facilitate timely launch of facilities • Meet project deadlines consistently

Budget Adherence: >95% • No cost overruns for all projects undertaken • Maintain financial discipline

Safety Performance: Zero LTIs • Ensure safe execution across all projects • Implement and monitor safety protocols

Compliance: >95% • Adherence to Safety and Statutory compliance • Meet regulatory requirements

Initiative Completion: 100% • Complete and rollout specific project management initiatives on time in full.

COMPETENCIES REQUIRED

Technical Skills: • Strong understanding of mechanical and electrical systems in industrial construction • Proficiency in project management methodologies and tools • Knowledge of building codes, safety regulations, and statutory compliance • Budget management and financial acumen • Vendor management and procurement processes

Leadership & Management: • Ability to lead cross-functional teams • Strong stakeholder management skills • Resource planning and allocation • Risk management and mitigation

Communication: • Excellent written and verbal communication skills • Ability to prepare and present progress reports to senior leadership • Coordination with multiple teams (RE, Procurement, Launch, Facilities)

Important Note: The role includes 40% travel for project assignments, which is crucial for candidates to understand upfront.

jobs.description:
AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.

You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.

Amazon Data Center Operations team deploys and maintains the servers and infrastructure in our data centers. Amazon uses large-scale, high-density data centers and we support our customers 24x7 all year, so work is by shift, on-call or a combination. The cloud business is continuously growing and offering new features, so our data center infrastructure is always dynamic and expanding.

AWS 인프라 서비스 (AIS)
AWS 인프라 서비스는 모든 AWS 글로벌 인프라의 설계, 계획, 제공 및 운영을 담당합니다. 즉, 우리는 클라우드를 운영하는 팀입니다. AIS는 고객이 의존하는 혁신에 지속적으로 액세스할 수 있도록 모든 AWS 데이터 센터와 모든 서버, 스토리지, 네트워킹, 전력 및 냉각 장비를 지원합니다. 또한 공급망에 영향을 미치는 수천 가지 변수가 있는 가장 어려운 문제를 해결하기 위해 노력하고 있으며, 이에 도움을 줄 재능 있는 인재를 찾고 있습니다.

소프트웨어, 하드웨어, 네트워크 엔지니어, 공급망 전문가, 보안 전문가, 운영 관리자 및 기타 중요한 역할로 구성된 다양한 팀에 합류하게 됩니다.AWS 전반의 사람들과 협력하여 최고 수준의 안전 및 보안 표준을 제공하는 동시에 고객에게 가능한 최저 비용으로 무한해 보이는 용량을 제공할 수 있게 됩니다.또한 대담한 아이디어를 환영하고 이를 소유하여 완성할 수 있게 하는 포용적인 문화를 경험하게 될 것입니다.

AWS의 데이터센터 운영팀은 글로벌 클라우드 컴퓨팅 인프라를 설계, 설치 및 유지 관리하고 있습니다. 운영팀의 업무 범위에는 Linux 시스템 장애처리, HW 서버 복구, 네트워크 이슈 해결, 데이터 센터 유지 보수 지원 등이 포함됩니다.

Amazon은 대규모의 고밀도 데이터 센터를 사용하며 일년 내내 연중 무휴로 고객을 지원하므로 업무는 교대근무로 이루어집니다. 클라우드 비즈니스는 지속적으로 성장하고 새로운 기능을 제공하므로 데이터 센터 인프라는 항상 동적이며 확장됩니다.

Key job responsibilities
Maintain efficiently a high level of system reliability by prioritizing and resolving trouble tickets related to Systems and Network hardware problems
Linux server and XEN service virtualization troubleshooting
Remediate physical layer outages on both Systems & Network
24x7 On-Call requirements and shift rotations
Install & configure racks in-line with internal SLAs
Triage & resolve trouble tickets for all devices
Physical replacement of server and network devices
Define metrics to increase our customer uptime
Enforce Amazons Security Best Practices
Interact with third party vendors & contractors
Contribute ideas to improve operational efficiency
Participate in and deliver on a number of local/regional/global projects
Participate in team meetings for metric analysis and project status updates
Contribute in building the world’s largest Cloud infrastructure
* This role involves covering 24x7 shift rotation

시스템 및 네트워크 하드웨어 이슈 해결을 통해 시스템 안정성 유지
Linux 서버 및 XEN 서비스 가상화 문제 해결
시스템 및 네트워크의 물리적 계층 문제 해결
외부/계약 업체와의 협업
보안 및 안전 관련 프로세스 및 지침 준수
24x7 On-Call 교대 근무
서버 및 네트워크 장치의 물리적 교체
DC 업무 환경 개선 및 운영 효율성 향상을 위한 프로세스 개선 작업
글로벌 프로젝트 참여 기회 제공

About the team
Diverse Experiences
AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

Why AWS?
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.

Inclusive Team Culture
AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.

Mentorship & Career Growth
We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

Work/Life Balance
We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
jobs.description_short: AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers
jobs.preferred_qualifications:
- Experience in data center engineering or operations
- Network certification
- CCENT/CCNA, Network+
- Scripting skills - Bash, Python, Perl, etc. - Project coordination/management experience
- Bilingual (Korean/English)

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
jobs.title: Data Center Operations Engineer, DCO (Data Center Operations)

jobs.basic_qualifications:
- Bachelor's degree, or Bachelor of Arts degree
- Minimum of 7+ years of relevant creative experience, including 3+ years leading creative teams
- Experience in managing Gen-AI content creation and digital production teams
- Strong understanding of Gen-AI technologies and digital content creation
- Experience in managing global teams across different time zones
- Experience in driving business/operations metrics
- Leadership skills with bias towards action
- Experience working in a collaborative team environment to deliver high-quality design solutions
- Experience communicating technical concepts and processes using clear, simple language and visuals
jobs.description:
About the role: The Digital Studios (DS) team handles digital content creation, Gen-AI operations, and post-production activities for Amazon product images to provide consistent imagery and enable customers with their buying decisions. We are continually innovating and setting new industry standards for showcasing millions of products across multiple global marketplaces. Design Manager will be responsible for managing Digital and Gen-AI Content Generation Specialist teams both globally and regionally.
We're looking for a proficient Design Manager who can understand technical challenges from both artistic and technological perspectives while working directly with all levels of content specialists and other stakeholders. The position requires proven ability to drive process improvements and keep pace with our explosive growth while motivating team members in an extremely deadline-driven environment.


Key job responsibilities
• Lead and manage global and regional Digital and Gen-AI Content Generation teams across Physical and Digital Studios
• Drive operational and business goals across multiple regions
• Optimize content creation processes for quality, scalability, and efficiency
• Drive data-oriented analysis and adoption of Gen-AI technologies
• Manage stakeholder communication across multiple lines of business
• Ensure high quality standards in hiring and team development
• Execute specific people programs on coaching and development
• Build robust teams of creative and technical talent globally
jobs.description_short: About the role: The Digital Studios (DS) team handles digital content creation, Gen-AI operations, and post-production activities for Amazon product images to provide consistent imagery and enable customers
jobs.preferred_qualifications:
- Experience working with technology teams and solving operational issues using technology
- Experience working with global cross-functional teams
- Knowledge of Gen-AI platforms and content creation tools

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. jobs.title: Manager, DS, Digital Studios
